3.2.1 Technical Methods for Automated Synthetic Content Detection

Description of algorithmic method for detection 
based on input features

Statistical formulas or decision criteria can be 
manually constructed to classify or score content as 
synthetic or not. Such methods may also be used to 
provide cues to assist human decision-making or as a 
way of pre-processing content for downstream 
detection algorithms.
